description_long: This helmet features a faceted, polygonal design with a predominantly gold and black color scheme. The front is dominated by a wide, black visor area that wraps around the sides, providing a sleek, modern appearance. Two pointed ear-like protrusions are present on the top, giving it a distinctive, stylized look. On the upper left side, there is a bold, abstract black graphic that adds visual interest to the otherwise solid gold surface. The rear and lower portions of the helmet are mostly dark, with the gold color forming angular bands that accentuate its geometric form. The helmet appears to be constructed from hard, durable materials suitable for urban use, likely offering substantial protection.
description: A gold and black polygonal helmet with a wide black visor, pointed ear-like features, and an abstract graphic on the side.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide black visor, gold upper section, and pointed ear-like features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the abstract black graphic on the gold surface and the angular transition between gold and black.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the mostly dark surface with gold ear-like protrusions and minimal graphic detail.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the geometric gold and black pattern, with no visible graphics.
attribute_graphic_design: Abstract black graphic on the left side of the gold surface; otherwise solid gold and black geometric pattern.
